content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms from Topic A (ICM/RND for autonomous curious agents) can be repurposed to prioritize what new information gets stored in state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, filtering out low-surprise redundant data that would otherwise waste limited context window and long-term storage capacity. This creates a self-sustaining active learning loop where an agent’s innate curiosity automatically curates its own memory to improve future task performance without human-labeled data oversight.
